work_completed.details: Merged 4 commits (pre-merge blockers, sidebar nav, docusign optimization) into main with conflict resolution in ChatPanel.tsx
Added quick link /dashboard/ai in Visão Geral section + new 'IA & Análises' section with 4 role-scoped persona links (admin, financial, commercial, operational)
Root cause: AI_COPILOT_ENABLED not set in Vercel environment. Diagnosed via DevTools. Also optimized output styling (prose-xs, reduced spacing/margins) for compact display.

remaining_work.task: Verify Vercel env vars are set
remaining_work.details: User must set in Vercel dashboard: AI_COPILOT_ENABLED=true, OPENAI_API_KEY, AI_MODEL_DEFAULT, NEXT_PUBLIC_AI_PERSONAS_ENABLED
Run checklist in docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-15-ai-personas-smoke.md (4 personas × hubs, cache behavior, RBAC, output quality)

blockers.description: AI chat returns 503 'AI copilot desativado' on production
blockers.root_cause: AI_COPILOT_ENABLED environment variable not configured in Vercel
blockers.solution: Set environment variables in Vercel dashboard (Settings → Environment Variables)

human_actions_pending.action: Set environment variables in Vercel dashboard
human_actions_pending.context: Production deployment requires explicit env var configuration; .env.local only works locally

human_actions_pending.action: Trigger Vercel redeploy or await automatic deploy
human_actions_pending.context: After setting env vars, changes need to be deployed
Verify all 4 personas work, cache behavior, RBAC, output quality

decisions.decision: Use subagent-driven development for AI Personas implementation
decisions.rationale: Fresh subagent per task with two-stage review (spec compliance + code quality) for high-quality, fast iteration

decisions.decision: Pragmatic scope: personas as chat presets, defer execution-style assistants to V2
decisions.rationale: Ship faster, simpler system; advanced features can be added later

decisions.decision: Defer thundering herd race condition mitigation to V1.1
decisions.rationale: Low risk (1 org, max 2-3 concurrent clicks); adding Postgres advisory locks adds complexity; TODO comment in code for future

decisions.decision: Optimize AI output styling (prose-xs, compact spacing)
decisions.rationale: Original spacing (prose-sm, mt-6, mb-3, leading-7) made output too verbose; reduced to prose-xs, mt-2, mb-1, leading-5 for readability

git_state.last_commit: bba364f - style(ai): reduce output spacing and font size for compact display

context_notes: AI Personas feature is code-complete and merged to main. Primary blocker is environment variable configuration on Vercel. Local dev works fine with .env.local. All 4 commits for feature have been applied (pre-merge fixes, sidebar nav, docusign optimization, styling). Code compiles successfully, unit tests pass (7/7 in personas.test.ts), Next.js build succeeds. Ready for production deployment once env vars are set. Smoke test checklist available for final validation.
next_action: Set AI_COPILOT_ENABLED=true and other required env vars in Vercel dashboard, then redeploy to production. After deploy, run smoke test matrix to verify all personas work correctly.
